faq.title: Questions?
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Lompoc Deals.
faq.q1: Is Lompoc Deals free to use?
faq.a1: Yes, completely. Browsing deals and claiming them is always free for Lompoc residents. No account required to browse.
faq.q2: How do I claim a deal?
faq.a2: Click "Claim Deal" on any offer. If it requires an account, sign up in 30 seconds — just your email. Then show your phone at the business.
faq.a3: Sign up as a business (free), create your profile, and post your first deal in under 5 minutes. The free plan includes 3 active deals.
faq.q4: What does it cost to list my business?
faq.a4: Our Free plan is $0 forever — 3 deals, basic profile. Standard is $19.99/month for unlimited deals and priority placement.
faq.a5: For now, yes. We're 100% focused on Lompoc. That's what makes it work — every deal is from someone local, for someone local.
faq.q6: How do I get the weekly deals email?
faq.a6: Create a free account and subscribe to the weekly digest. Every Tuesday morning, the top 5 deals go straight to your inbox.

hotels.metaTitle: Lompoc Hotels & Accommodations — Where to Stay | Lompoc Deals
hotels.metaDescription: Find curated hotels in Lompoc, CA. From budget-friendly motels to upscale suites — near Vandenberg Space Force Base, downtown Lompoc, and the Santa Rita Hills wine country.
hotels.metaOgDescription: Curated hotels in Lompoc, CA — from budget to boutique.
hotels.eyebrowBadge: Flower Capital of America · Lompoc, CA
hotels.heroSubheading: {count} curated hotels — from budget-friendly stays near Vandenberg to boutique inns steps from the Santa Rita Hills wine trail.
hotels.trustWineDesc: All hotels near Santa Rita Hills AVA
hotels.whyVisitSubheading: Your reason for visiting shapes the best place to stay.
hotels.whyWineDesc: World-class Pinot Noir & Chardonnay. Dozens of tasting rooms within 20 minutes of downtown.
hotels.whyRocketDesc: Rocket launches visible from the city. Home to SpaceX Falcon 9 polar orbit missions.
hotels.whyFlowerDesc: The Flower Capital of America. Acres of blooms from April through June every year.
hotels.whyMuralsDesc: 80+ murals in Old Town tell Lompoc's history. La Purísima Mission is minutes away.
hotels.neighborhoodHeading: Which Area Should You Stay In?
hotels.neighborhoodSubheading: Lompoc has three distinct hotel zones — each suited to a different kind of visit.
hotels.neighborhoodHStreetDesc: The main hotel strip. All major chains are here — within minutes of dining, gas, and the Vandenberg gate. Easy freeway access.
hotels.neighborhoodDowntownDesc: Closest to Old Town murals, the Friday Market, and local cafés. Budget options with genuine neighborhood character.
hotels.neighborhoodWineCountryDesc: If you're visiting for the Santa Rita Hills AVA, staying in Buellton or Solvang puts you right in wine country — full-service amenities and vineyard views.
hotels.tip1Body: The annual Lompoc Flower Festival (June) fills hotels fast. Book at least 2–3 months ahead. The H Street corridor is your best bet for availability.
hotels.tip2Body: SpaceX launches from Vandenberg are often visible from Lompoc. Check the launch schedule — the H Street hotels have clear sightlines to the north.
hotels.tip3Body: Most Lompoc hotels are 15–25 minutes from Santa Rita Hills tasting rooms. Stay in town and hire a driver, or stay in Buellton for vineyard immersion.
hotels.tip4Body: Motel 6, Red Roof Inn, Quality Inn, Days Inn, and Cabrillo Inn welcome pets. Always call ahead to confirm policies and fees.
hotels.tip5Body: The Holiday Inn Express and Hampton Inn consistently offer the best value: hot breakfast included, pools, and prime location — at mid-range prices.
hotels.tip6Body: Lompoc is car-dependent. All major hotels have free parking. The H Street corridor puts you within 10 min of most attractions.
hotels.ctaBannerBody: Get your property in front of thousands of visitors planning trips to Lompoc, the Santa Rita Hills, and Vandenberg Space Force Base.

locals.metaTitle: For Locals — Discover Deals & Support Lompoc Businesses | Lompoc Deals
locals.metaDescription: Sign up free and get exclusive deals from 470+ Lompoc businesses. Save favorites, get the weekly digest, and discover what's happening in your hometown.
locals.heroBody: Lompoc Deals connects locals to exclusive discounts, specials, and announcements from the businesses that make this city great. Free forever — no spam, no ads.
locals.heroTrustLine: ✓ Always free  ·  ✓ No credit card  ·  ✓ Unsubscribe anytime
locals.statCardNoteBody: Save favorites, get deal alerts, and never miss a Lompoc special again.
locals.howItWorksBody: No app download. No credit card. No catch.
locals.step1Body: Sign up in 30 seconds — just your name, zip code, and a password. Tell us your interests so we only show you what matters.
locals.step2Body: Browse 470+ Lompoc businesses by category, search by name, or explore the deals feed. No algorithm burying what you care about.
locals.step3Body: Heart your favorites, get the weekly digest with the top deals, and redeem offers directly with local businesses.
locals.b1Body: Every coupon, special, and announcement comes directly from a Lompoc business owner — not a national chain, not a bot.
locals.b2Body: Heart the businesses and deals you love. Come back anytime and find them waiting. Build your personal Lompoc guide.
locals.b3Body: One email every Saturday morning — the top 10 deals from Lompoc businesses that week. Unsubscribe with one click, anytime.
locals.b4Body: 470+ businesses are listed. Many you've probably never heard of. The Wine Ghetto, local repair shops, wellness studios — all here.
locals.b5Body: Every deal you redeem goes straight to a Lompoc business owner. Not Amazon. Not a franchise. Your neighbor.
locals.b6Body: Your account is free forever. We never sell your data, show ads, or flood your inbox. Just local deals when you want them.
locals.whatYouGetBody: No tiers, no upgrades, no hidden costs for locals. Full access, always.
locals.feature5: Search by category, name, or keyword
locals.feature9: Works on any phone or computer
locals.categoriesBody: Restaurants, wineries, retail, services, health, auto — if it's in Lompoc, it's in the directory.
locals.finalBody: Join your neighbors. Discover deals. Support the businesses that make this city worth living in.
locals.finalCtaSecondary: or browse deals without signing up →

hero.subtitle: Lompoc Deals is the free, hometown-first directory for the Flower Capital. Post your coupons, specials, and announcements in 30 seconds — and reach the people already searching for the shops they love.
hero.trustLine: ✓ Free forever for the basics  ·  ✓ No credit card  ·  ✓ 30-second setup
hero.newThisWeek: Dashboards for hours, photos, social links, and listing claims.

howItWorks.subtitle: No demos. No sales calls. No 47-page contracts. Just sign up and post.
howItWorks.step1Body: Find your business in our directory and click 'Claim it,' or list a brand-new one in 30 seconds. Free forever.
howItWorks.step2Body: Logo, hours, social links, and a description. Your profile goes live the moment our admin approves it (usually same-day).
howItWorks.step3Body: Coupons, specials, announcements — post as many as you want, edit anytime, expire whenever. Locals see them on the feed.

benefits.b1Body: Every visitor is searching for businesses right here. No tourists, no out-of-towners — just locals.
benefits.b2Body: Post coupons, specials, and announcements. One flat monthly fee — no per-deal charges, no pay-to-win tricks.
benefits.b3Body: See exactly how many people viewed your profile and clicked through to your site. No mystery.
benefits.b4Body: Your best deal goes out in our Saturday email to confirmed Lompoc locals. Free distribution.
benefits.b5Body: Repeat customers save your deals to their favorites. Build a following without spending on ads.
benefits.b6Body: It's your listing. Edit, expire, or remove anything. We never run ads on your profile or sell your data.

pricing.subtitle: Pay one flat monthly fee. No per-deal fees, no hidden charges, no ads on your profile.
pricing.footnote: No credit card required for the Free plan. Cancel paid plans anytime.

finalCta.subtitle: You can be live on Lompoc Deals before your coffee gets cold.
